response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering experience with recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and cloud-native tooling, aligning with key GenAI/cloud requirements. However, his expertise in production-grade AI solutions (8+ years) is not clearly evident in the resume, and he lacks direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks. His background in TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS) is relevant, but the depth of AI-specific contributions is uncertain.
strengths: Relevant recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (Altom Consulting, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (primary role at re:cinq post-April 2025 may not satisfy this)
No clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks
Master's/PhD or deep LLM optimization expertise not mentioned
